landing_tagline: Rise through the ranks. Rule the city.
landing_description: Commit crimes, earn cash and build your criminal empire. Do you have what it takes to become the most feared boss in town?
side_footer_left: A Hustler's Way • The Family Table
rip_fail: {target} fought you off — you only gained heat.
rip_err_cooldown: Too soon — wait a moment before ripping {target} again.
rip_err_no_cash: {target} has no cash on hand to rip.
rip_err_in_jail: You can't rip anyone while you're in jail.
rip_err_dead: You can't rip anyone while you're dead.
cd_desc: Every timer on your account — crimes, heists and more — with live countdowns.
cd_none: No active cooldowns. Get to work.
hm_decay_note: Heat passively cools while you stay off crimes. High heat raises your jail chance; at 75+ you become Most Wanted.
hm_lawyer_owned: Corrupt Lawyer retained — heat cools 50% faster.
hm_lawyer_buy: Retain a Corrupt Lawyer (+50% decay, permanent)
hm_lay_low_desc: Hide out here to clear your heat.
hm_store_note: Heat also cools on its own over time while you lay off the crime.
hm_toast_lawyer: Corrupt Lawyer retained — your heat now cools 50% faster.
hm_err_no_heat: You have no heat to cool down.
hm_err_already_lawyer: You already have a corrupt lawyer on retainer.
mw_page_desc: The hottest criminals in the city, ranked by heat. Lay low, bribe a cop, or hire a lawyer to drop off the list.
feed_empty: Nothing happening yet… go make some noise.
lb_subtitle: All criminals • Ranked by overall power
ld_desc: Criminal income is dirty — it can't be banked or invested until it's washed. Pick a channel, pay the fee, and pray the feds aren't watching.
ld_guide_s1_body: All criminal income — crimes, heists, rips, hits, race winnings, drug sales — arrives as dirty cash. You can't spend, bank or invest it.
ld_guide_s2_body: Laundromat: always available, 30% fee, $5M per 24h. Casino Chips: level 10, 18% fee, $10M. Offshore Account: level 25, 10% fee, $25M. Caps are rolling 24-hour windows.
ld_guide_s3_body: Every wash can get busted — the risk is your heat divided by 300. Busted means the whole batch is confiscated and +20 heat. Lay low or bribe a cop before washing big.
ld_guide_s4_body: The one-time Corrupt Lawyer upgrade halves your bust risk on every wash (and speeds up heat decay). Serious launderers want one.
ld_success: Washed {washed} — {cleaned} clean landed in your pocket (fee {fee}).
ld_busted: 🚨 BUSTED! The feds confiscated {lost} and your heat spiked.
ld_err_cap: That channel's 24h capacity is full — try another or wait.
ld_err_dirty: You don't have that much dirty cash.
ld_err_level: Your level is too low for this channel.
ld_err_jail: You can't launder from a jail cell.
ld_note: Higher heat = higher bust risk. Lay low or bribe a cop first if you're hot.
common_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
username_desc: This is the name other players will see. Choose wisely — it cannot be changed (yet).
error_username_invalid: Invalid name. Use 3–16 letters, numbers or _.
auth_hero_login_sub: The most dangerous and immersive mafia browser game. Build your empire. Control the city.
auth_update_1_text: Trade based on real in-game economy
auth_update_2_text: Real Blackjack & Roulette feeding the pools
auth_updates_footer: New content drops weekly. The city never sleeps.
auth_welcome_back: Welcome back, boss. Time to make moves.
auth_hero_register_sub: Create your gangster. Build your family. Dominate every system.
auth_secrets_footer: YOUR SECRETS ARE SAFE WITH US
register_check_email: Almost there! Check your email inbox to confirm your account.
error_user_exists: An account with this email already exists.
error_password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_load_player: Could not load your player profile. Try refreshing the page.
crime_result_success: Success! You got away with {cash} (+{xp} XP)
crime_result_fail: Busted! The cops threw you in jail. No XP gained on failure.
crime_level_up: LEVEL UP! You are now level {level}!
error_on_cooldown: Too hot right now — this crime is still on cooldown.
error_in_jail: You are in jail. Wait until you are released.
error_level_too_low: Your level is too low for this crime.
rankings_empty: No ranked players yet. Go commit some crimes!
rankings_no_username: Pick a gangster name on the dashboard to appear on the leaderboard.
error_load_leaderboard: Could not load rankings. Try refreshing the page.
jail_desc: See who's locked up. Train your breakout skills.
hospital_desc: Buy blood to restore your health. The streets are dangerous.
hospital_drop_note: Health drops every time you commit a crime. Higher risk jobs cost more.
hospital_amount_label: How much health do you want to buy? (max {max})
hospital_already_full: You are already at full health.
hospital_price_note: Price: $8 per health unit. Enter any amount or use quick buttons to fill exactly what you need.
casino_desc: High stakes. Real risk. Losses fuel the city economy and growing jackpots.
casino_pool_note: Grows with every loss. Big wins come from here.
casino_house_edge_note: House edge ~1.5-4% but big swings keep it exciting.
casino_blackjack_desc: Classic. ~48.5% win chance. 1.95x payout on wins. Donators get tiny edge.
casino_blackjack_note: All losses go directly into Blackjack pool. Big money moves here.
casino_roulette_desc: Red / Black / Straight up. House edge keeps pools growing.
casino_roulette_note: Every spin feeds the Roulette pool. The gamble crowd loves this one.
casino_roulette_lose: Spin {spin}. House takes the {bet}. Pool fed.
casino_footer: The Casino is the heart of the underground economy. Every loss you take (or others) grows the pools that pay the big lottery jackpots and future events. Play smart — or go broke trying. Donator status gives a microscopic edge.
safehouse_desc: Your properties for growing, storage, and cars. Details, costs, upgrades.
safehouse_none: Purchase a House, Villa or Mansion in Real Estate to unlock Safehouse features.
safehouse_welcome_mansion: Welcome back, Kingpin! Time to stack that empire in {name}. (Mansion vibes - let's hustle with style!)
safehouse_welcome_villa: Back in the game, boss. {name} is ready for the next move. Mid-tier motivation - keep pushing!
safehouse_welcome_house: Welcome back, hustler. {name} is your grind spot. Low life but we rise!
safehouse_details_note: Full details and upgrades coming. Pay bills in Real Estate.
safehouse_hired: Hired bodyguard #{num} for {cost}. Raid chance now {chance}%.
safehouse_bodyguard_note: Need 2+ to be effective. Max 10. Alternative: buy house weapon for protection.
safehouse_piggy_invalid_deposit: Invalid amount or not enough cash!
safehouse_piggy_confirm_deposit: Confirm deposit of {amount} to Piggybank? This will be hidden from global leaderboard.
safehouse_piggy_deposited: Deposited {amount} to Piggybank (hidden from global total). Transferred successfully.
safehouse_piggy_invalid_withdraw: Invalid amount or not enough in Piggybank!
safehouse_piggy_confirm_withdraw: Confirm withdraw of {amount} from Piggybank to Cash? (0.8% fee {fee} to Gov Tax, you get {net})
safehouse_piggy_withdrew: Withdrew {net} from Piggybank (fee {fee} to Gov Tax). Transferred successfully.
safehouse_piggy_note: Piggybank is hidden from general leaderboard. Family leaderboard sees full player wealth.
safehouse_shed_trackers_note: Live trackers: Progress, quality % (see Weed Grow for details). Cooldowns sync globally.
safehouse_shed_confirm: Confirm shed upgrade to lvl {level} for {cost}?
safehouse_earnings_result: Day earnings: +{net} (after 20% tax {tax}). Weekly earnings tracking updated.
safehouse_shed_section_desc: Weed storage and grow progress. Move to dedicated Weed Grow.
safehouse_garage_section_desc: Cars, tuning, racing. Full garage features.
safehouse_post_desc: Pay open bills, debts, unpaid taxes. Live trackers. Property tax rates and info.
safehouse_tax_rate_note: Property Tax Rate: 10% on purchase, 20% on earnings (to Gov Fund)
safehouse_confirm_pay_bills: Confirm pay all open property bills: {total} (cash)?
safehouse_bills_no_cash: Not enough cash for all bills!
safehouse_post_footer: All tax to Government Fund. Admin sees summary.
garage_desc: Cars tied to your property. Max cars: {max}. Upgrade Warehouse for more.
garage_locked: Buy a House, Villa or Mansion in Real Estate to unlock Garage!
garage_upgrade_note: Villa: base 4, +25/75/125 per lvl. Mansion: +10 more.
garage_upgraded: Warehouse upgraded to lvl {level}! Now holds {max} cars.
garage_need_villa: Need Villa or Mansion to upgrade Warehouse.
garage_tune_shop_desc: Basic tune +value. Buy parts below for speed bonuses (engine, turbo etc).
garage_repair_desc: Repair value. More damage = higher cost. Must 100% for tune.
garage_repaired: Car repaired for {cost}. Ready to tune!
garage_marketplace_desc: Low end (hatchbacks), Mid (sedans like Lexus/Mercedes/Nissan), High, Super sport.
garage_low_end_label: Low End (15 examples: Civic, Corolla, Focus, etc.)
garage_junkyard_desc: Crush for small bullets (city prices vary, low - better buy at Metal Factory).
race_desc: Post a race with timer. Opponent joins. Entry fee. 10min cooldown after. History below.
race_select_valid: Select a valid car (75%+ health) to post race.
race_health_req: Car must have at least 75% health.
race_posted: Race posted! Entry fee {fee}. Expires in {minutes} min.
stocks_desc: Prices driven by family power, crime volume, and live market ticks. Buy low. Sell high. Real money. Real risk.
stocks_portfolio_note: Holdings update on every trade. Advance the market by playing the game or refreshing here.
stocks_demo_warning: ⚠️ Demo data shown. Real stock market requires running the migration first.
stocks_migration_error: Stock market tables not created yet. Run the latest migration (FIX_034_stocks_table.sql or 034_stock_market_casino_economy_admin.sql).
stocks_admin_only: Only the admin can move the market.
stocks_footer_1: Market moves with the city: more crimes + stronger families = upward pressure. Losses from casino also subtly affect CASROY.
stocks_footer_2: Specific drivers active: Real Estate buys → GOTHAM up. Drug sales → PHARMA. Family power buys → FAMPOW. Heists → HEISTX. Racing → RACERZ. Casino play → CASROY.
stocks_admin_title: 🛠️ ADMIN MARKET MOVERS (only visible to you)
market_desc: Bid on properties released by the dev. Highest bid wins when timer runs out. Real auctions with escrow are in development — this preview never touches your cash.
market_bid_too_low: Bid must be higher than current!
market_bid_preview: PREVIEW: Bid of {amount} registered (no cash taken). Real auctions with escrow are coming soon!
market_instant_first: Enter an instant buy price first.
market_instant_preview: PREVIEW: Instant buy for {name} at {price} (no cash taken). Real marketplace is coming soon!
market_footer: Once won, visit the property in Real Estate to manage bank, set health prices (for hospitals), pay maintenance.
dealer_desc: Prices change every 4 hours per city. Buy low, sell high in other cities for big profits (hidden drug economy). Tax 1.5% to Community Fund.
dealer_prices_updated: Street prices updated in {city}. Look for profitable runs!
dealer_no_cash_tax: Not enough cash (incl. 1.5% tax to Fund)!
dealer_cap_reached: Carry cap reached for {drug}! Max {cap} kg. (Weed higher due to growing.)
dealer_bought: Bought {amount} {drug} for {total} (incl tax). Sell high in another city!
dealer_sold: Sold {qty} {drug} for {revenue}. Profit from the run!
weed_desc: Grow your own in safehouse. Water for quality % (can fail and go negative = destroyed).
weed_locked: Buy a House/Villa/Mansion in Real Estate to grow.
weed_max_progress: Already at max progress. Harvest first.
weed_water_success: Watered successfully! Gained +{change}% harvest quality. Current: {percent}%
weed_water_fail: Water failed! Lost {change}% harvest quality. Current: {percent}%
weed_need_progress: Need at least 4/5 progress to harvest.
weed_cap_reached: Shed cap reached! Max {cap}kg weed. Sell some first.
weed_destroyed: Harvest destroyed due to negative quality! All progress lost.
weed_harvested: Harvested {kg}kg Weed at {percent}% quality! Added to storage.
weed_water_note: Water 4-5 times. Each water: ~70% +15% quality, 30% -10%. Final % determines yield. Negative = destroyed.
murder_locked_banner: Murder locked until Hitman rank (level 16+) and 50%+ KillSkill. Current: Level {level} / {skill}% KillSkill
murder_low_skill_banner: Below 75% KillSkill: Reduced success chance. Clean hits require 75%+.
murder_desc: Bullets required. Clean hit = Rank + 75%+ KillSkill.
murder_locked_alert: Murder locked. Reach Hitman rank (level 16) and 50% KillSkill.
murder_invalid_input: Invalid input. Need at least 10 bullets and a target name.
detective_desc: Request a search for a player. Results come via in-game message.
detective_report_body: Detective found {target} in {city}. You have 5 minutes to travel there and kill them!
detective_complete: Search complete! Check your Messages. {target} spotted in {city}.
detective_footer: Cost: $500. Search takes 15 real minutes. Results sent via Messages. You have 5 min to act after notification.
factory_desc: Buy illegal bullets. High volume purchases risk police attention.
factory_busted: Police caught you! Fined {fine}, +30 heat, bullets confiscated. 5 min jail risk.
factory_current: Current bullets: {bullets}. Use in PvP kills.
dead_leaderboard_note: Only Leaderboards are accessible while dead.
dead_respawn_note: Respawn with 1% health when timer ends.
status_how_1_text: = players with activity in the last 15 minutes (updated on every action/login).
status_how_2_text: = unique players active within the last 7 days.
status_how_3_text: = sum of all cash + personal bank balances across the entire server.
status_how_4: Family stats update live when players create, join, donate, or buy power.
status_footer: Numbers are fully dynamic via database. Press Online in the top bar anytime to return here.
about_subtitle: A Hustler's Way — Rise from the gutter. Become legend.
about_p1: The year is 2026. The streets have never been colder, the cities never more divided. Five ruthless metropolises — New York, Chicago, Los Angeles, Miami, and Las Vegas — are battlegrounds where only the bold survive.
about_p2: You wake up with nothing but the clothes on your back and a hunger in your gut. No family. No reputation. No power. Just a name and the choice that will define you.
about_p3: You decide how you become the God of the Streets.
about_p4: Will you start small — picking pockets in the alleys, running low-risk street deals, building your first stack of dirty cash? Or will you chase the big scores: bank heists, high-stakes murders, and territory wars that can make or break entire families?
about_quote: “Every choice leaves a mark. Every crime builds your legend. Every alliance or betrayal writes the next chapter of your story. In this world, loyalty is currency and power is the only law.”
about_p5: Grow your empire through crime, heists, and calculated violence. Master the art of murder as a true Hitman. Build hidden weed operations in safehouses across cities. Race for pink slips and tune the fastest cars in the underground. Invest in real estate that generates passive income — and risk — while you sleep.
about_p6: But no one rises alone. Form or join a Family. Donate to the treasury, watch your leaders convert blood money into raw Family Power. That power fuels deadly wars, strengthens your attack and defense, and — most importantly — generates real hourly pay for every loyal member. 60% lands safely in the bank. 40% hits your pocket in cash. The stronger the family, the richer every soldier becomes.
about_p7: Travel between cities to exploit shifting economies. Buy low in one, sell high in another. Own properties only where you currently stand — you must travel to see and claim the best real estate of other territories.
about_p8: Climb the ranks. From Hobo to Kingpin. From lone wolf to the most feared Family on the leaderboards. Diamonds open VIP doors: personal buffs, and powerful Family upgrades that make your crew unstoppable. Smart players know when bundles of diamonds give the edge.
about_final_3: Will you become the God of the Streets?
about_loop_text: Crime → Heist → Murder → Build → Family Power → Repeat. Every action feeds your legend and your wallet.
about_cities_text: 5 living cities with shifting prices. Travel to unlock new opportunities, properties, and better runs.
about_families_text: Donate. Buy power. Grow hourly payouts. Wage wars. The leaderboard never forgets who ran the city.
about_footer: A Hustler's Way • Everything is connected. Your choices echo across the underworld.
armory_desc: Purchase raw power and buffs. Affects heists, crimes and PvP.
armory_footer: Power increases your overall strength. Higher power = better leaderboard position and slight heist bonuses.
re_desc: Own the city. Grow your empire (and weed). Pay your bills on time or lose it all.
re_city_only: You only see properties available in {city}. Travel to another city to view and buy properties there.
re_dev_note: Dev released agencies appear on the Marketplace for bidding. Residential properties (House / Villa / Mansion) are direct purchase for weed & safehouse use.
re_none: No residential properties listed for {city} right now. Travel to discover more.
re_risk_house_65: 65% Police Raid - High risk for small timers!
re_risk_villa_30: 30% Police Raid - Upgrade to Warehouse for cars!
re_flavor_residential: "Grow your green empire here - or watch it burn."
re_agency_title: Agency Properties in {city} (Dev Released on Marketplace)
re_flavor_agency: "Steady cash from the streets - but watch the heat!"
re_agency_bid_note: Bid on Marketplace. No direct purchase.
re_autopay_label: Autopay Bills Weekly (before Sunday evenings - extra tax + late fees if skipped)
re_no_properties: No properties owned yet. Buy a House/Villa/Mansion above for weed production.
re_max_mansion: Max 1 Mansion per player (to avoid overpowering weed yields).
re_max_villas: Max 2 Villas (must be in different cities).
re_villa_diff_city: Villas must be in different cities.
re_house_in_city: You already own a house in this city. Houses must be in separate cities (max 4 total in 4 different cities).
re_warning_1: Buying another house means more grinding! Bills will stack up like crazy - your wallet's gonna cry, but hey, more weed spots!
re_warning_2: Second (or third) property? Brace yourself for the bill avalanche. Serious cash drain incoming, but the empire grows... with funny tax jokes from the IRS.
re_warning_3: Another house? Time for more hustle! The weekly bills are coming in hot - prepare for 'funny' reminders that you're now a multi-property mogul with multi-bill pain.
re_no_cash_tax: Not enough cash including 10% property tax!
re_bought: Bought {name} in {city} for {price} (+{tax} 10% tax to Gov Fund)!
re_confirm_pay: Confirm pay {amount} via {method} for this property?
re_no_bank: Not enough in bank (5% extra tax)!
re_confirm_autopay_on: Confirm enable autopay for this property?
re_confirm_autopay_off: Confirm disable autopay for this property?
re_autopay_on_msg: Autopay enabled! Will deduct weekly before Sunday.
lottery_desc: Draw happens every Friday. Prizes include cash, items, and jackpots.
lottery_donator_note: As a Donator you get 1 ticket. Non-donators receive 3 tickets for better odds.
lottery_regular_note: Non-donators get 3 tickets. Donators get 1. This gives regular players a fair shot at big wins.
lottery_won: 🎉 FRIDAY DRAW WINNER! Cash Jackpot — {prize}. Cash added.
lottery_lost: Tough draw. Non-donators get better odds to keep the economy moving. Try again next Friday!
lottery_footer: Lottery prizes are drawn every Friday. Jackpot and item pools grow with casino losses.
profile_footer: Full detailed profile with family history, owned properties, and more coming soon.
tracker_footer: All your active cooldowns, live. Click the arrow for the full overview.
logs_event_heist: Big heist robbed in New York!
logs_footer: Live updates: promotions, kills, heists, activities. Synced.
famlb_subtitle: All families • Ranked by total respect + family power (hourly & wars)
famlb_none: No families yet. Be the first to start one.
famlb_footer: Family power = built from donations (via leaders buying power). Drives hourly pay (60/40) and Fam Wars strength.
admin_denied: Access denied. Only YGhosty has full admin tools.
admin_subtitle: Absolute control. No restrictions. Everything you touch persists.
admin_log_empty: No actions yet. Use controls below.
admin_tax_note: All taxes → Gov. Casino losses → Pools (for lottery & events).
admin_tax_footer: Rates noted here affect future calculations (see bank/safehouse/real-estate). Extend with global_settings table if needed.
admin_edits_note: Edits persist via secure admin RPCs. Use responsibly.
admin_footer: Full power. Stocks, casino pools, rebirths, families all controllable here or via direct DB.
journey_desc: Everything you need to survive and rise in the streets of 2026. Pick a section below.
journey_guide_desc: Full friendly guide to all systems, tips, and how to progress.
journey_tips_desc: Helpful tooltips and quick advice extracted from the systems.
journey_menus_desc: Explanation of every menu, tab, and navigation in the game.
journey_roadmap_desc: What's coming next, including Casino, Lottery, and more.
journey_footer: This section is your central hub for learning the game. More tips and guides will be added over time.
guide_desc: A friendly walkthrough of the game. Read this first if you're new.
guide_start_1: Start with low-risk crimes like Pickpocket to build your first cash and XP.
guide_start_2: Level up and unlock better crimes, heists, and murder.
guide_start_3: Buy a House in Real Estate as soon as you can — this unlocks Weed Growing.
guide_start_4: Join or create a Family to earn passive hourly pay.
guide_sys_crimes: Commit crimes to earn cash and XP. Failures give no XP. Heat builds up and can lead to extra jail time. Donators get +25% XP and +20% cash.
guide_sys_families: Create or join one. Donate to build the family bank. Leaders buy Power, which gives everyone hourly pay (60% to your personal bank, 40% cash).
guide_sys_safehouse: Buy Houses, Villas, or Mansions. They give you weed growing spots, car storage, and (for Mansions) a hidden Piggybank.
guide_sys_weed: Water plants to build progress (0/5 to 5/5). Quality % affects your final harvest. Can fail and go negative.
guide_sys_banking: Personal Bank for safety. Family Bank shared with crew. Mansion owners get a secret Piggybank (hidden from global leaderboard).
guide_sys_racing: Post 2-player races. Choose your car (needs good condition). Entry fees and betting. 10-minute cooldown after.
guide_tip_1: No XP on failure. Success is the only way to level.
guide_tip_2: Keep your heat low — high heat means random police trouble.
guide_tip_4: Donator perks stack with events and rebirths.
guide_tip_5: Properties cost money to maintain — pay your bills.
guide_footer: This is a living guide. More details will be added as the game grows.
tips_desc: Quick helpful advice pulled straight from the game systems.
tips_crimes_1: Pickpocket: "Easy money from careless tourists. Low risk, but low reward."
tips_crimes_2: Rob Store: "Hit a store. Medium risk, decent payout. Watch the heat!"
tips_crimes_3: Steal Car: "Boost a ride for the garage or a quick flip."
tips_crimes_4: No XP on failure. Success is the only teacher.
tips_family_1: "Donate to the family. Leaders turn it into Power for everyone's hourly pay (60% bank, 40% cash)."
tips_family_2: "Power = family strength. More power = bigger hourly payouts for all members."
tips_safehouse_1: "Own the city. Grow your empire (and weed). Pay your bills on time or lose it all."
tips_safehouse_2: "Mansions have a secret Piggybank – hidden from the global leaderboard but visible to your family."
tips_safehouse_3: Buy properties only in your current city. Travel to see others.
tips_banking_1: "Personal Bank: Safer than your pocket. Small tax on moves."
tips_banking_2: "Piggybank (Mansion only): Your hidden stash. Doesn't count toward global wealth."
tips_banking_3: All big transfers now require confirmation before execution.
tips_general_1: "Heat is dangerous. High heat = random police trouble."
tips_general_2: "Donator perks stack on top of everything – including double XP events."
tips_general_3: "Always confirm big money moves. The streets don't forgive mistakes."
tips_general_4: "2 second cooldown between actions to keep things fair."
tips_footer: These tips are extracted from the live game systems and will be expanded over time.
menus_desc: Quick explanation of the main navigation and where everything lives.
menus_left_1_text: Crimes, Street Dealer, Weed Grow, Safehouse, Race, Admin Tools
menus_left_4_text: Player Guide, In-Game Tips, How to Use Menus, Roadmap
menus_top_1_text: Goes to the main dashboard / front page with round info and live clocks
menus_top_2_text: Server Status page (live player counts, families, money circulation)
menus_right_4: Information & Economy (Real Estate, Marketplace, Street Dealer)
menus_footer: Most pages have their own sub-tabs and live data. Use the Journey menu when you're lost.
roadmap_desc: What's coming next and what we're building toward.
roadmap_soon_1_text: Blackjack, Roulette, and more. All bank losses feed into a central Casino Bank (with sub-categories per game).
roadmap_soon_2_text: Pull system with items and jackpots. Non-donators have higher win chance than donators.
roadmap_soon_3_text: Full car list (low/mid/high/super), real images on steal, mod system.
roadmap_soon_4_text: Central cooldown page + better widget across the game.
roadmap_long_1: Professional UI with consistent backgrounds and images across all menus.
roadmap_long_2: Full in-game help system pulled from these docs (tooltips everywhere).
roadmap_long_3: Deeper economy (more realistic taxes, property earnings that actually accumulate over time).
roadmap_docs_intro: We're building a complete set of living documents so that:
roadmap_docs_1: Any AI can read the current state and help effectively.
roadmap_docs_2: Players get clear, helpful tips directly in the game.
roadmap_docs_3: Everything stays consistent as the game grows.
roadmap_footer: This Roadmap page will be updated regularly. Check back often.
rebirth_desc: You've reached Godfather — the top of the food chain. Start over from the streets with a permanent +50% cash & XP bonus and 10% faster cooldowns (max 50%). Stacks with every Rebirth.
rebirth_confirm_text: Your rank resets to Slum Rat (level 1). Your cash stays. This cannot be undone.
rebirth_done: REBORN! The streets whisper your name. You now earn +{bonus}% cash and XP on everything.
error_not_godfather: Only a Godfather can be reborn.
crime_rob_store_desc: Quick cash, but the owner might fight back.
crime_steal_car_desc: Hotwire it and race to the chop shop.
crime_warehouse_heist_desc: Hit a warehouse for big scores.
crime_train_murder_desc: Practice your killing skills. High risk PvP training.
tw_page_desc: Claim cities for your family, earn hourly income, and go to war over occupied turf.
tw_rules_hint: City income flows into the family bank (24h backlog cap). Wars last 24 hours — every member can attack once a minute, bullets add extra points. Highest score wins; ties go to the defender. The winner takes the city, +250 respect and 10% of the loser's family bank. After a war the city is shielded for 24 hours.
tw_declared_ok: War declared over {city}! The battle lasts 24 hours.
tw_err_not_in_family: You are not in a family.
tw_err_not_authorized: Only the boss or underboss can do this.
tw_err_protected: This city was just fought over — it is shielded for 24 hours.
tw_err_at_war: One of the families is already at war.
tw_err_owned: This city is occupied — you must declare war for it.
tw_err_unclaimed: This city is unclaimed — claim it instead.
tw_err_not_your_war: Your family is not part of this war.
fi_page_desc: Your family's internal channel — broadcasts from the leadership, messages to the higherups, and join requests.
fi_no_family: You are not in a family. Join one to get access to the family inbox.
fi_empty: No messages yet. Break the silence.
fi_member_hint: Your messages go to the leadership.
fi_err_not_in_family: You are not in a family.
fi_err_not_authorized: Only managers and up can broadcast to the whole family.
fi_err_too_fast: Easy — wait a few seconds between messages.
fi_err_target_taken: That player already joined another family.
error_no_stamina: Not enough stamina — rest up or hit lighter jobs.
rb_page_desc: The prestige system: reach the top, start over, come back stronger.
rb_progress: Reach level {needed} (Godfather) to rebirth — you are level {level}.
rb_what_body: Rebirth is the prestige system. Once you hit Godfather (level 46) you can be reborn: back to level 1, but with permanent bonuses that stack every time you do it.
rb_how_body: Climb to level 46 — Godfather, the top of the food chain. Then hit the Rebirth button on this page and confirm. There is no other requirement and no cost.
rb_bonus_body: Each rebirth permanently gives +50% cash and XP on everything, 10% faster cooldowns (max 50%), and a growing diamond bonus on the moment of rebirth.
rb_reset_body: Level back to 1, XP to 0. Health, heat, jail, death timers and all crime/heist cooldowns are wiped clean. Murder experience keeps only 20%; breakout skill resets.
rb_keep_body: Your cash, bank, dirty cash, properties, cars, weapons, gym stats, diamonds and your Family. Rebirth takes your rank, not your empire.
gym_desc: Train your body. Strength wins fights you start — Defense wins the ones you don't.
gym_strength_effect: Better odds when ripping or hitting other players, and harder war attacks.
gym_defense_effect: Makes you harder to rip or murder.
gym_err_jail: You can't train while in jail.
gym_not_enough_stamina_hint: Not enough stamina for this many sessions.
gym_note: Each session costs 20 stamina and gets pricier as your stat grows. Stats are permanent.
factory_empty: The factory is sold out — come back when it has restocked.
factory_low_stock: Only {stock} in stock — you'll get what's left.
bg_desc: Each bodyguard absorbs one incoming rip or murder attempt — the guard goes down, you don't.
bg_note: Prices climb per guard: $50k, $100k, $200k, $350k, $500k. Max 5. Lost guards must be re-hired.
rip_blocked: A bodyguard stepped in — {target} was untouchable. Their guard went down though.
murder_blocked: A bodyguard took the bullet — the target survived. Their guard is gone.
ev_wallet: 💰 You found a fat wallet on the way: +{amount} dirty cash!
ev_tip: 🤫 An informant tipped you off — the cops looked the other way (-10 heat).
ev_shakedown: 🚔 Police shakedown! They squeezed {amount} out of you (+10 heat).
ev_mugging: 🔪 You got mugged in an alley and lost {amount}.
pi_tt_heat: Heat: police attention from crimes. Cools down over time. At 75+ you are Most Wanted — more police busts and laundering risk.
pi_tt_dirty: Dirty cash: criminal income. You can't spend or bank it — launder it first (click to open).
pi_tt_stamina: Stamina: physical energy for crimes, heists, PvP and the gym. Regenerates while you rest.
pi_tt_stats: Strength wins fights you start, Defense resists rips and hits. Train both at the gym (click to open).
msg_page_desc: Your phone — DMs with other players and messages from the city.
msg_pick_thread: Pick a chat on the left, or start a new one.
msg_system_note: Official notifications — you can't reply to City Hall.
msg_err_too_fast: Easy — wait a few seconds between messages.
fam_subtitle: The criminal organizations that run the city.
fam_none_text: You are not part of a family yet. Join one to unlock the family bank, territories, wars and hourly pay.
fam_turf_none: Your family controls no cities yet.
fam_members_mgmt_pending: Member management needs the latest game update (074) on the server.
fam_confirm_leave: Are you sure you want to leave your family?
fam_err_not_authorized: You do not have permission to manage this role.
fam_err_role_change: Failed to change this member's role.
fam_err_kick_authorized: Only the Boss or Underboss can kick members.
fj_subtitle: Send a join request — the family leadership decides who gets in.
fj_already_in_text: You are already in a family. Leave it first if you want to move.
fj_pending_banner: Join request pending at {family}. Leadership will review it.
fj_none: No families have been founded yet. Be the first!
fj_create_teaser: Got the cash and the reputation? Found your own family and become the Boss.
fj_create_cost: Cost: {cash} cash or 25 diamonds. Donators can create at any rank with diamonds.
fj_err_already_in: You are already in a family.
fj_err_pending: You already have a pending join request.
fj_err_request: Could not send a join request to this family.
fj_err_cancel: Failed to cancel the join request.
fj_err_tag_taken: That tag is already in use.
fj_err_no_username: You must set a gangster name first.
fj_err_funds: Not enough funds: you need 2,000,000 cash or 25 diamonds.
fj_err_level: You need at least level 10 to create a family. Donators can create at any rank with diamonds.
fb_subtitle: The treasury of {family}. Members can look; leadership manages.
fb_hourly_text: Every member earns an hourly payout from the family bank, scaled by family power. 60% goes to your personal bank, 40% to cash. Accrues up to 48 hours.
fb_claimed: Claimed {hours}h of pay: {total} total • {bank} → bank • {cash} → cash.
fb_power_text: Convert bank funds into permanent family power. Power raises everyone's hourly pay and your strength in family wars.
fb_confirm_power: Spend {amount} from the family bank on power?
fb_err_power_authorized: Only the Boss, Underboss or Accountant can buy power.
fb_err_power: Failed to buy power — is there enough in the bank?
fb_view_only: The bank is view-only for your rank. The Boss, Underboss and Accountant manage the treasury.
fb_how_1: Members donate cash on the Donations page — every donation lands directly in the family bank and earns respect.
fb_how_2: Leadership converts bank funds into family power, which raises hourly payouts and war strength.
fb_how_3: Territory income from owned cities also flows into the family bank every hour.
fd_subtitle: Fund the war chest of {family}. Every donation counts — literally.
fd_donate_text: Donations go straight into the family bank and immediately raise family respect.
fd_done: Donated {amount} to the family bank. +{respect} respect!
fd_respect_note: Respect gained: 10% of the donated amount (minimum 1).
fd_donors_none: No tracked donations yet. Be the first — your total starts counting now.
fd_bank_note: Wondering what the family does with the money?
fp_unavailable: Family profiles need the latest game update (074) on the server.
fp_no_family: You are not in a family. Open a family profile from the leaderboard, or join one yourself.
market_no_listings: No listings in this category right now.
race_no_valid_cars: No race-ready cars (needs ≥75% condition). Fix one up in the garage:
race_rules_note: Posting costs a 10% entry fee. Winner takes the full pot; the car takes some wear.
shop_subtitle: Everyday gear paid with cash. Diamond and VIP items live in the VIP Store.
shop_vip_teaser: Donator status, diamond boosts and family buffs — the premium counter.
shop_protection_desc: Reduces health loss on crimes and heists.
shop_footer: Diamonds are earned through rebirths and special events.
vip_subtitle: Everything premium in one place: donator status, diamond boosts and family buffs.
vip_donator_pitch: Unlock permanent donator status with a one-time purchase. Global XP +25%, earnings +20%, 25% shop discount, faster regen — plus the exclusive tag.
vip_donator_item_desc: One-time activation • permanent tag + global perks
vip_permanent_note: After purchase the donator tag is yours permanently.
vip_confirm_donator: Spend {cost} diamonds on permanent Donator Status?
vip_welcome: 🎉 Welcome to Donator Status! XP +25%, earnings +20% and the shop is now 25% cheaper.
vip_thanks: Thanks for supporting the game — your donator perks are active everywhere.
vip_err_no_family: You must be in a family to buy family buffs.
vip_perk_xp_desc: +25% XP from all crimes, heists and activities.
vip_perk_cash_desc: +20% cash rewards from crimes and heists.
vip_perk_regen_desc: Stamina and heat recover noticeably faster.
vip_buffs_desc: Convert cash or diamonds into family power. Bundles are ~12% better value — donators only.
vip_buff_p100_desc: Direct war strength + hourly pay boost
vip_buff_p250_desc: Major boost to attacks, defense and payouts
vip_buff_hourly_desc: Raises the family payout rate via power
prof_private_note: Only you can see this section. Other players see the public card above.
prof_settings_bio_ph: Tell the city who you are…
status_unavailable: Live statistics are momentarily unavailable. Try refreshing.
tv_car_hint: Fuel only • no cooldown • wears the car
tv_no_cars: You have no cars. Buy one first in the
tv_refuel_hint: Refuel at the pump in the
tv_done_car: Drove to {city}. Used {litres}L, car took {wear}% wear.
tv_err_cooldown: The next train hasn't arrived yet — wait or take a car/plane.
tv_err_fuel: Not enough fuel for that trip. Refuel in the garage.
tv_err_damaged: That car is too damaged to drive (needs 25%+ condition).
tv_err_already: You are already in that city.
tv_footer: Fuel prices differ per city — Las Vegas is cheapest, New York the priciest. Big tanks cross the country; small ones don't.
gr_no_cars: No cars in your garage yet.
ts_subtitle: Basic tuning and performance parts. A car must be at 100% condition to tune.
ts_footer: Tuning raises resale value and race speed. Parts stack; the basic tune is one-off per car.
jy_subtitle: Crush cars into bullets. The scrap goes to the metal factory.
jy_warning: Crushing destroys the car permanently. If you want the money instead, sell it in the garage.
jy_confirm: Crush the {name} for bullets? It's worth {price} if you sell it instead. This cannot be undone.
jy_footer: Bullets can also be bought at the
dt_subtitle: Pay a private eye to find someone. Real work takes real time.
dt_how_text: A search costs {cost} and takes 15 real minutes. The report lands in your Messages and names the city the target was tailed to. The tip stays good for 5 minutes — get to that city and act before they move.
dt_hired: Detective on the case: tailing {target}. Cost {cost}. Report in 15 minutes.
dt_report_when_done: The report will arrive in your Messages.
dt_no_reports: No cases yet. Hire a detective to locate someone.
dt_footer: Reports are also delivered to your inbox:
dt_err_in_progress: Your detective is already on a case. One at a time.
murder_no_intel: You don't know where they are. Hire a detective to locate them first.
murder_target_moved: They're not in your city. The tip is going cold — get to them fast.
murder_intel_required: A hit needs a warm tip: locate the target at the Detective Agency, then be in their city within 5 minutes.
lv_subtitle: Walking out on {family} has a price — and so will your head.
lv_rule_fee: The exit fee is 5% of your cash and bank (minimum $25,000, capped at $5,000,000) and is taken from your cash on hand.
lv_rule_bounty: That exact amount becomes a bounty on your head, live for {days} days.
lv_rule_who: Only members of the family you left can collect it — by landing a rip or a hit on you.
lv_rule_rejoin: You can request to join another family right away, but the bounty follows you.
lv_confirm_text: Leave {family} for {fee}? Your former crew gets a {amount} contract on your head for the next 7 days.
lv_done_bounty: Your former family can now collect {amount} for hunting you down. Watch your back for 7 days.
lv_not_in_family: You're not in a family, so there's nothing to leave.
lv_boss_blocked: You're the boss and {count} member(s) are still in the crew. Promote someone else to boss before you walk.
lv_cant_afford: You need {fee} in cash on hand to buy your way out.
lv_err_boss: Hand the family over to a new boss first.
lv_err_cash: Not enough cash on hand for the exit fee.
bo_subtitle: Deserters your family can hunt — and whether there's a price on your own head.
bo_on_you_title: There's a {amount} bounty on your head
bo_on_you_text: {family} put it there when you walked out. It expires in {days} day(s).
bo_none_open: Nobody has walked out on your family. Loyalty is good for business.
bo_how_text: There's no claim button — land a successful rip or a hit on the deserter while the contract is live and the money is yours automatically, as dirty cash. Only your family can collect.
po_subtitle: Property bills and city taxes. Buying property happens at the estate agent.
po_no_properties: You own no property, so there's nothing to pay. Buy one at
po_bank_fee: Paying from the bank carries a 5% transfer fee. Cash is exact.
po_footer: Everything you pay here is counted on the
re_billing_moved: Property bills, taxes and autopay moved to the Post Office.
tb_subtitle: Every dollar the city has collected in property bills and deposits — and who paid it.
tb_me_unranked: You haven't paid a cent in tax yet. The city notices.
tb_empty: Nobody has paid any tax yet.
tb_footer: Counts property bills (paid at the Post Office) and voluntary deposits. Paying from the bank costs 5% more but counts the full amount.
cas_failed: The table rejected that. Try again.
bj_place_bet: Place a bet and deal to start a hand.
bj_rules: Dealer draws to 16 and stands on all 17. A natural blackjack pays 3:2. No doubling or splitting. The deck is shuffled server-side every hand — the house can't see your cards and neither can you see the deck.
rl_subtitle: Single-zero wheel. Every bet carries the same 2.70% house edge.
rl_rules: European single-zero wheel: 18 red, 18 black, one green zero. Straight up pays 35:1, dozens and columns 2:1, outside bets 1:1. The zero is what gives the house its 2.70% — it beats every outside bet.
vp_subtitle: Jacks or Better. Deal, hold what you like, draw once.
vp_place_bet: Place a bet and deal five cards.
vp_tap_to_hold: Tap the cards you want to keep, then draw.
vp_rules: A pair only pays from jacks up. Jacks or better returns your stake; everything above it multiplies. One draw per hand — the undealt deck stays on the server.
rps_subtitle: Straight odds against the house. A draw returns your stake.
rps_rules: The house throws blind, one in three each way. A win pays 1.9× your stake and a draw gives it back — that missing 0.1 is the house's cut (3.33%).
sp_subtitle: Something broken or unclear? Tell us and we'll look into it.
rp_subtitle: Report someone for cheating, abuse or anything else that breaks the rules.
rp_private_text: Only you and the staff can see a report. The player you name is never told who filed it, or that one exists at all.
tk_subtitle: Everything you've filed, and what the staff said back.
tk_empty: You haven't filed anything yet. Start at
tk_sla_text: Tickets are answered in the order they arrive. You'll see the reply here — check back rather than filing the same thing twice.
tk_sent: Sent. You'll find the reply under Tickets.
tk_closed_note: This ticket is closed. Open a new one if it comes back.
tk_err_too_many: You already have 5 tickets open. Wait for a reply first.
tk_err_body: Tell us a bit more than that.
tk_err_long: That's too long — keep it under 2000 characters.
tk_err_generic: Could not send that. Try again.
mk_subtitle: Real auctions between players. Bidding holds your cash and listing holds your car.
mk_none_live: Nothing up for auction right now. List one of yours.
mk_bid_placed: Bid placed at {amount}. Your cash is held until someone outbids you.
mk_bought: Bought the {title} outright. It's in your garage.
mk_sell_title: Put a car on the block
mk_no_cars: You have no cars to sell. Buy one in the
mk_listed: Listed. Your car is held until the auction ends.
mk_sell_note: While it's listed you can't sell, crush, tune or drive the car. The house takes 5% of the final price, and a bid in the last 2 minutes extends the clock.
mk_footer: Bids are binding: your cash is taken when you bid and returned in full the moment someone outbids you. Cars only for now.
mk_err_garage_full: You have nowhere to keep it — buy a bigger property first.
mk_err_bid_low: That bid is under the minimum.
mk_err_own: You can't bid on your own listing.
mk_err_has_bids: It already has bids — you can't pull it now.
mk_err_listed: That car is already on the block.
mk_err_buynow: Buy-now has to beat the starting price.
mk_err_price_low: The starting price is too low.
mk_err_passed_buynow: Bidding has already passed the buy-now price.
cr_subtitle: The {family} crusher turns cars into bullets for the family armoury.
cr_none_text: Your family does not own a crusher yet. Leadership can buy one out of the family bank — after that, any member can feed cars in.
cr_buy_cost: A Klein crusher costs {cost}. Family bank: {bank}.
cr_leadership_only: Only the boss, underboss or accountant can install one.
cr_armoury_full_note: The armoury is full — hand bullets out before crushing more, or the extra is scrap.
cr_feed_text: Each car gives the family {count} bullets. The car is gone for good — the junkyard pays YOU 15 instead, so this is a contribution, not a payday.
cr_confirm: Feed the {name} to the family crusher for {count} bullets? It is worth {price} sold, and this cannot be undone.
cr_crushed: Crushed the {car} — the family armoury gained {count} bullets.
cr_give_text: Move bullets from the family armoury to a member. Leadership only.
cr_no_members: There is nobody else in the family yet.
cr_upgrade_text: A {next} crusher takes more cars and gives more bullets each. Cost {cost} from the family bank (currently {bank}).
cr_upgrade_note: A new machine resets the cars-converted counter — you are replacing the whole thing.
cr_footer: Klein: 8 bullets/car, 500 cars, 10,000 armoury. Middel: 12/car, 1,500 cars, 25,000. Groot: 16/car, 5,000 cars, 50,000.
cr_err_worn: This crusher has done its last car — upgrade to a new machine.
cr_err_on_auction: That car is up for auction — pull the listing first.
cr_err_not_authorized: Only the boss, underboss or accountant can do that.
cr_err_bank: The family bank cannot cover it.
cr_err_bullets: The armoury does not have that many bullets.
cr_err_not_member: They are not in your family.
cr_err_max_tier: The crusher is already at the highest tier.
jail_empty: Nobody is locked up right now.
lot_subtitle: One ticket, one shot a week. Win and the pool pays out.
lot_pool_active: Live — a win pays 8% of this.
lot_pool_building: Builds from losses; pays out past {threshold}.
lot_ticket_cost: A ticket costs {cost}. You can enter once every 7 days.
lot_lost: No win this time. Your {cost} ticket funds the pool.
lot_err_cooldown: You've already played this week — wait for your next entry.
lot_how_1: Each ticket costs {cost} and goes toward the jackpot pool.
lot_how_2: Donators win 42% of the time, everyone else 37%.
lot_how_3: Below {threshold} a win pays a flat 25,000–105,000. Above it, a win pays 8% of the whole pool.
lot_how_4: One entry per player every 7 days.
casino_lottery_teaser: Weekly draw — the pool pays out once it grows big enough.
stocks_unavailable: The market is temporarily unavailable. Prices are live server-side — nothing is shown rather than guessed. Try again shortly.
hub_clocks_note: Synced every second. Crimes, weed, races and cooldowns update globally.
